id.description: The unique identifier of the local gateway route table.

local_gateway_id.description: The ID of the local gateway associated with the route table.

local_gateway_route_table_id.description: The ID of the local gateway route table.

outpost_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Outpost associated with the route table.

state.description: The current state of the local gateway route table.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the local gateway route table.
